# melis x402 Tools

16 pay-per-call x402 utility APIs for AI agents. USDC on Base. No accounts, no API keys, no subscriptions. Charge-on-failure-safe across the fleet.

> Boring infrastructure for AI agents. Built by Sean Melis (sean@melis.ai). Based in Australia.

Pricing: $0.001 to $0.49 per call, paid in USDC on Base via the x402 protocol.
Settlement: ~2 seconds on Base (Coinbase L2).
Wallets: 0x1C680703D6cF7dfC9FEABb5AA28E64B869ddB3bC (microservices, 13 services), 0x61F2eF18ab0630912D24Fd0A30288619735AfFf5 (Molt Swarm, 3 services).
Install: npx @melis-ai/x402-tools-mcp (npm, MIT, open-source wrapper)
Fleet status: 14 green / 0 red (last audited 2026-05-07)

## Services

- CacheServe: URL fetch with server-side caching · $0.001 · https://cacheserve.melis.ai/fetch
- DocConvert-Text: Format conversion (md↔html, json↔csv, etc.) · $0.001 · https://docconvert-text.melis.ai/convert
- SchemaGate: Validate LLM output against JSON Schema · $0.001 · https://schemagate.melis.ai/validate-schema
- NotifyRelay /webhook: POST JSON to any public URL (HMAC-signed) · $0.001 · https://notify.melis.ai/webhook
- PromptGuard: Prompt injection risk score (0–100) · $0.002 · https://promptguard.melis.ai/score
- NotifyRelay /notify: Send Telegram message · $0.002 · https://notify.melis.ai/notify
- StructExtract: HTML → structured JSON (tables, links, emails, phones) · $0.002 · https://structextract.melis.ai/extract
- DocConvert-PDF: HTML or markdown → PDF (base64) · $0.005 · https://docconvert-pdf.melis.ai/convert
- LinkRisk: Lightweight URL risk profile (heuristic) · $0.005 · https://linkrisk.melis.ai/profile
- MarkdownOpt: URL or HTML → clean LLM-ready markdown (~70% token reduction) · $0.005 · https://markdownopt.melis.ai/markdown
- NotifyRelay /email: Send transactional email · $0.005 · https://notify.melis.ai/email
- LinkSafe: Definitive URL safety check (Playwright sandbox + VirusTotal) · $0.01 · https://linksafe.melis.ai/verify
- ScrapePay: Web extraction via Playwright (robots.txt enforced, charge-on-failure-safe) · $0.01 · https://scrapepay.melis.ai/scrape
- Screenshot: Headless Chromium PNG · $0.02 · https://molt.melis.ai/screenshot
- Web Synthesise: Multi-source research synthesis with citations · $0.05 · https://molt.melis.ai/web/synthesise
- PDF Render: High-fidelity URL or HTML → PDF via Playwright · $0.49 · https://molt.melis.ai/pdf/render

## Key documentation

- [Install MCP](https://agents.melis.ai/docs/install-mcp): one-command setup for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code, Continue
- [x402 payment flow](https://agents.melis.ai/docs/x402-payment): how the protocol works, client libraries, settlement details
- [Composition recipes](https://agents.melis.ai/compose): canonical agent workflows with code examples and cost breakdowns
- [Pricing](https://agents.melis.ai/pricing): full price table and comparison vs alternatives

## Optional

- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@melis-ai/x402-tools-mcp): open-source MCP wrapper (MIT)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/mizukaizen/x402-tools-mcp): MCP wrapper source code
- [Basescan — microservices wallet](https://basescan.org/address/0x1C680703D6cF7dfC9FEABb5AA28E64B869ddB3bC#tokentxns): live payment transparency
- [Basescan — Molt Swarm wallet](https://basescan.org/address/0x61F2eF18ab0630912D24Fd0A30288619735AfFf5#tokentxns): live payment transparency
